frontend/src/App.tsx.reason: Main app shell: event-analysis, operations audit, multi-view state, per-section loading skeleton tracking, and scoped cross-view error handling so background stock-detail failures do not bleed into the Short Pick Lab surface. Mobile UI JSX in dedicated components/mobile/*. Planned refactor deferred.

frontend/src/styles.css.reason: Global CSS: variables, layout, component styles, Ant Design overrides, responsive breakpoints, dark-mode Select dropdown/selection-item fixes. Cascade-dependent.

src/ashare_evidence/analysis_pipeline.py.reason: Analysis pipeline: announcement body fetching, LLM enrichment, financial trends. Cohesive pipeline definition.

src/ashare_evidence/api.py.reason: FastAPI application with dashboard, simulation, settings, manual-research, watchlist, stock, event-analysis, improvement-suggestion, shortpick lab, and shortpick replay routes. The latest change keeps shortpick run-list endpoints on compact summaries to avoid large payload timeouts; router extraction remains possible but would add broad touch points across the current schema surface.

src/ashare_evidence/cli.py.reason: CLI command group: data refresh, cache management, admin operations, event/improvement audit triggers, database write preflight (db.py), benchmark index bar sync, and shortpick replay/distillation/rejector/hard-veto/factor-rank/market-factor-study experiment commands.

src/ashare_evidence/dashboard.py.reason: Dashboard views: hero payload, price chart, follow-up prompt, candidate list, change detection, and event-analysis / data-quality projections. The added growth is still concentrated in dashboard serialization logic.

src/ashare_evidence/intraday_market.py.reason: Intraday market data: fetching, caching, status tracking, and runtime freshness helpers. Single responsibility.

src/ashare_evidence/manual_research_work.reason: Manual research workflow: request creation, execution, completion, retry. Single workflow.

src/ashare_evidence/models.py.reason: SQLAlchemy ORM models: Stock, Recommendation, PaperOrder, PaperPortfolio. Naturally cohesive.

src/ashare_evidence/operations.py.reason: Operations dashboard builder with tightly coupled payload functions, order checks, summary/detail split, and suggestion-audit surfaces. Extraction was considered, but the current payload-building path still shares too much domain state to split safely in this closeout turn.

src/ashare_evidence/phase2/holding_polic.reason: Phase 2 holding policy experiment runner: sweep execution, result collection. Cohesive experiment.
Phase 2 holding policy study definition: parameters, backtest config, analysis, and graduation gate accounting. Still a cohesive study artifact.

src/ashare_evidence/release_verifier.py.reason: Release verification: build check, health check, parity verification. Single workflow.

src/ashare_evidence/runtime_config.py.reason: Runtime configuration management: settings resolution, defaults, validation. Single responsibility.

src/ashare_evidence/schemas.py.reason: 60+ Pydantic models with cross-references (StockDashboardResponse, OperationsDashboardResponse aggregate types from all domains). Domain split carries medium risk due to model inheritance chains and runtime validation dependencies. Planned but deferred for test coverage.

src/ashare_evidence/services.py.reason: Service layer: recommendation serialization, claim gate, direction capping, and richer factor/data-quality projection. The current growth remains inside one recommendation-serving boundary.

src/ashare_evidence/signal_engine_parts/.reason: Fusion engine with dynamic weights, conflict resolution, recommendation payload assembly, and richer factor contribution metadata. Still cohesive around final recommendation generation.

src/ashare_evidence/simulation.py.reason: Cohesive simulation engine: position sizing, performance metrics, scenario config, order execution. Single-domain logic with tight internal coupling.

src/ashare_evidence/improvement_suggesti.reason: Suggestion audit workflow: ledger extraction, data-quality degraded-source grouping, legacy snapshot projection, dual-model review orchestration, confidence aggregation, snapshot persistence, and control-plane plan handoff. The file is large because the artifact-driven workflow is still cohesive and shares one contract surface; further split can happen later around reviewer transport and snapshot rendering.

tests/test_dashboard_views.py.reason: Dashboard view contract tests now also lock event-analysis, professionalization, and suggestion-audit UI contracts. The file is broad, but that breadth is deliberate because these are cross-surface user-visible contracts.

frontend/src/components/OperationsTabs.t.reason: Operations dashboard tabs: suggestion-audit, filter state, model-picking modal, per-section loading skeletons for simulation_workspace, improvement_suggestions, manual_queue, replay, portfolios. The latest growth adds explicit completed-state rendering and hides worklist actions for finished suggestions; future split into per-tab components is still desirable.

frontend/src/components/ShortpickLabView.reason: Short Pick Lab workspace component currently owns live run, validation queue, model feedback, and historical replay workbench state in one Ant Design surface. Historical replay now includes aggregate statistical readouts, per-run drilldown, and expanded replay family labels for distillation and rejector comparisons; live validation/model-feedback loaders now clear stale tab errors before retry. It should be split into tab components after replay contracts stabilize, but keeping it together avoids cross-file churn during the visible replay rollout.

src/ashare_evidence/event_analyzer.py.reason: Event-driven analysis pipeline: external data fetching (5 AKShare sources), internal data gathering, prompt construction, LLM execution, and JSON artifact persistence. Single cohesive workflow.

src/ashare_evidence/signal_engine_parts/.reason: Multi-factor computation module: price, news, fundamental, size, reversal, liquidity factors with cross-sectional normalization. Cohesive factor definition.

src/ashare_evidence/shortpick_replay.py.reason: Shortpick historical replay v1 keeps sealed packet construction, sealed-packet-only LLM execution, failed-round handling without production proxy fallback, rejected-source/source-id leakage preservation, market-cap fallback bucketing, baseline controls, LLM self/momentum-pool distillation, LLM reject-only momentum gating, high-precision hard-veto controls, deterministic sealed-market feature rerankers, random reject controls, leakage audit, compact replay run listing, per-run and aggregate validation statistics, replay API helpers, post-audit contract normalization, and runtime-safe replay transaction boundaries in one first-version workflow. Diagnostic proxy remains explicit test mode only; split into packet/audit/baseline/distillation/rejector/ranker modules after the contract stabilizes.

src/ashare_evidence/shortpick_market_fac.reason: Backend-only Short Pick Lab market-factor study command: loads daily bars, builds expanded momentum pools, evaluates fixed and walk-forward feature rerankers, applies cost/entry assumptions, and summarizes train/holdout/replay windows. Kept cohesive while the research contract is still exploratory; split loader/evaluator/summary helpers if it becomes a production API.

tests/test_shortpick_replay.py.reason: Shortpick replay contract tests cover historical sealed-packet execution, failed-round behavior, leakage rejection, feedback ordering, replay distillation family insertion, and reject-only momentum-gating controls. Kept together while the replay experiment contract is stabilizing.

src/ashare_evidence/shortpick_lab.py.reason: Short Pick Lab workflow: native-web/open-discovery execution, source integrity, candidate parsing, validation, retry, serialization, and model feedback. The latest change adds compact run-list serialization so list endpoints do not embed candidate/source-packet detail; a module split remains desirable after the API contract stabilizes.
